nasb.text: One courier runs to meet another, And one messenger to meet another, To tell the king of Babylon That his city has been captured from end to end;

esv.text: One runner runs to meet another, and one messenger to meet another, to tell the king of Babylon that his city is taken on every side;

cnv.text: 驛卒一個接一個跑來， 報信的也相繼而至， 向巴比倫王報告， 他的京城已經完全被攻取了。

ccb.text: 报信的人接踵而来， 向巴比伦王禀告， ‘整座城已失守，
